name: Dark Forest Entrance
description: The trees close in around you. The air smells of rot and something older. Branches claw at your cloak like skeletal fingers.
ambient_text: Somewhere deep in the dark, something breathes.

events.label: Examine the crumbling shrine
dialogue: You brush moss from the stone face. Its eyes are wrong — too many, too knowing.
A cold certainty settles in your chest: someone worshipped something terrible here.
